organization.name: Certizen
organization.description: Certizen is a Hong Kong-based digital identity and trust services provider, specializing in PKI, electronic signatures, and verifiable credentials. Through its CertLei platform, Certizen acts as a Qualified vLEI Issuer (QVI) within the Global Legal Entity Identifier (GLEIF) ecosystem, issuing verifiable Legal Entity Identifier (vLEI) credentials for organizations and their representatives. Its solutions enable secure, privacy-preserving identity verification and trusted data exchange across sectors, with a strong focus on cross-border interoperability.
